text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as Bamboo Memory and I are getting
ready for the Yasuda Kinen, a certain piece of
news reaches our ears...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oguri's running in the Yasuda Kinen? For real?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa! Finally! It took until senior year, but
I'm finally gonna face off against Oguri! And in
my best distance too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm so excited, I can't wait! Come at me, Oguriiii!
RAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory is practically vibrating with
uncontrollable excitement. As usual, she doesn't
appear even vaguely intimidated by the thought
of racing against Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But as reassuring as her unshakeable confidence
is, I am a little worried about what things will be
like after they actually face off against each
other.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's do this, Trainer! Crank up the difficulty and
throw whatever you've got at me! It's time to turn
up the heat so I can beat Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory, on the other hand, has nothing
but solid belief in her dream and continues going
full steam ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I also have to believe in her
strength and persistence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Only a few days remain until the Yasuda Kinen. I
shake my fear off and renew my resolve to do
whatever it takes to help Bamboo Memory win!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(The Yasuda Kinen's almost here. I've gotta keep
up with my normal training, but I should probably
ramp up my solo sessions too...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Let's take a quick break, then do one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hello, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Working hard, I see.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Yaeno! You here for some solo
training too?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes. I also have to prepare for the Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Man, I can't wait to run against you and Oguri for
real!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Just imagining what kind of challenge Oguri's gonna pose has me so excited I can barely breathe!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that she will give us a spectacular
performance, as she always does.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're probably right! Gaaaaah! Why can't
the Yasuda Kinen just come already?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Your anticipation is palpable. You must really be
looking forward to competing against Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am! I mean, she's one of the ultimate
racers who might be able to make my dream come
true!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You... do realize she may end up devouring that
dream of yours, right?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What do you me—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: My apologies. Please forget I said anything.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I... shall take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wait! Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Dang it, I lost her! If I hadn't just finished running
up and down all those stairs, I would've been able
to catch her!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You... do realize she may end up devouring that
dream of yours, right?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: My apologies. Please forget I said anything.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I don't get it. What did she mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Rgh. I've gotta get even better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we meet up, Bamboo Memory opens up to
me about what happened between her and Yaeno
Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any idea what she meant, so I was
hoping you might.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What do you think she was getting at when she
said Oguri might devour my dream?
choice_data_list: I can't be sure, but if I had to say...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah? Yeah?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At her insistence, I begin to explain my
interpretation of what Yaeno Muteki might have
meant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of the reasons Oguri Cap is being hailed as
the star of this generation is because of the
breadth of her abilities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's excelled in everything from miles to long
distances. She's demonstrated incredible
versatility and strength that was practically
unheard of until now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think Yaeno Muteki was referring to what may
occur when someone comes face-to-face with
that kind of unmatched skill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suppose there's a racer who has worked so hard
and gained so much confidence in her ability to
run miles that she truly believes she can beat
anyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And after accomplishing great things and
convincing the world that she just might be the
strongest miler out there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She suddenly finds another racer with indomitable
strength standing in her way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's more, this new contender's peerless ability
is not limited to just mile races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just like the sun shines so bright you can't see
the stars, the miler would fade from people's
minds in light of the newcomer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"She's the strongest."
"No one stands a chance against her."
"She can win any race there is."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we were to put a name to the racer everyone
says these things about, it would be Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki has probably realized this. And not
just that... she was probably trying to break it to
Bamboo Memory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is a force to be reckoned with in every
distance—an incandescent flare that overshadows
every other Umamusume. And...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: A devourer of dreams, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So, Yaeno was trying to warn me?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But... now that you've said that, I think you might
be right.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ardan and Chiyono O said something similar a
while ago as well.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: And now even Yaeno thinks so...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right! That settles it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the chat, Trainer! You've helped me
realize exactly what I have to do!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: If Yaeno feels she has to tell me that, that means I really gotta hit Oguri with everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta show Yaeno that I actually can face
Oguri! If she sees me do that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
She'll see Oguri isn't someone who devours
dreams!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ardan once told me there are some things we can
only convey through running—not through words!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea how to explain why I don't think
Oguri is some dream devourer, but I still wanna
make Yaeno understand that! That's why I'll just
tell her through a race!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's the only way I can get my thoughts through
to her right now!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So, if it's okay with you...
choice_data_list: Sounds like we have to pick up the pace!
Sounds like we have to pick up the pace!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You read my mind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A new light burns in Bamboo Memory's eyes, and
our excitement for the Yasuda Kinen roars to a
fever pitch!
